name: Medallions of Pork Tenderloin with Cherry Meat Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the medallions with salt and pepper.
2. Heat the oil in a large covered skillet over a medium flame.
3. Add the medallions and brown well on both sides.
4. Drain the fat from the pan.
5. Combine the currant jelly, vinegar, orange juice, and tarragon in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the mixture over the medallions and cover.
7. Simmer for 25 minutes.
8. Turn the skillet and simmer for an additional 20 minutes until tender.
9. Remove from heat and transfer the chops to a serving platter or service plates.
10. Add the cherries to the pan and stir once.
11. Spoon the cherry mixture over the medallions.
12. Serve hot.
